replies: Hi! Nice to meet you here.
I've been replaying old indie playlists all week.
Depends on mood, but lo-fi usually wins.
Random mix: rock, reggaeton, and movie soundtracks.
I rewatch comfort movies more than I should.
Short series are my weakness, one sitting and done.
If it's suspense, I'm in immediately.
Tacos are always the correct answer.
I get hungry every time someone mentions pizza.
Deadlines always arrive faster than expected.
I pretend to be calm and then study intensely at night.
Coffee and a playlist, that's my survival pack.
I say I'll rest, then end up doing everything.
Maybe a chill hangout and good food.
No strict plans yet, which is usually the best plan.
